entries.content: modal verb negative must not or informal mustn't ① (indicating obligation, prohibition; stressing importance, necessity) 必须 bìxū▸ you must be patient 你必须要有耐心
entries.label: A
entries.name: modal verb

entries.content: noun informal 必不可少的东西 bì bù kěshǎo de dōngxi▸ this film is a must 这部电影不可不看
entries.label: B
entries.name: noun
